messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-574 — PromptEngine Slice 2 — fragment registry, content-hash fragment cache, and per-model adapter plugins
What it solves: When this slice lands, the two Slice-2 scenarios in
`BL-546-prompt-engine-slices-2-3.feature.draft` are superseded by this
ticket's feature file — the draft is trimmed to Slice 3 only in the same
parcel, so the design is not carried in two places. That trimming is part of
this ticket, not a follow-…
BL-574 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-574" (or "reject BL-574 <reason>") to act.
